query: UPDATE app_users SET tokenVersion = tokenVersion + 1, updatedAt = NOW() WHERE role != 'owner';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3AW8r3RRauadYzS.root --database MW3FicTy7ae3qrm8dx8Lua --execute UPDATE app_users SET tokenVersion = tokenVersion + 1, updatedAt = NOW() WHERE role != 'owner';
